notes: Multi-state ULP 91 average weighted by station count. QLD: 1238 stations, avg 187.8 c/L, source date 2026-02-28; WA: 734 stations, avg 201.3 c/L, source date 2026-04-20. NSW contributes only when NSW_FUELCHECK_API_KEY is configured.
source_rights: Mixed state government terms; verify each source before reuse
citation: NSW FuelCheck; Queensland Government Open Data Fuel Price Reporting; WA FuelWatch.

states.detail: Queensland Open Data latest public monthly file: Queensland Fuel Prices February 2026
